name: @trembus/project-system
description: First-principles, project-agnostic planning-artifact framework: one ProjectEntity contract (Identity · State · Relation), with a config-driven validator / scaffolder / guard / hub renderer. Zero runtime dependencies.

scripts.test: node lib/md.mjs --self-test && node lib/contract.mjs --self-test && node lib/swimlane.mjs --self-test && node tools/init-config.mjs --self-test && node tools/compare-config.mjs --self-test && node tools/validate.mjs --self-test && node tools/new-entity.mjs --self-test && node tools/guard.mjs --self-test && node tools/check-consumer-drift.mjs --self-test && node tools/check-zero-deps.mjs --self-test && node tools/check-zero-deps.mjs && node tools/check-consumer-drift.mjs --demos-only && node tools/render-hub.mjs --self-test && node tools/render-hub.mjs --check && node apps/command-center/scripts/verify-contract.mjs
